profiles.label: Google Drive 唯讀
profiles.purpose: 搜尋與讀取使用者有權存取的教材或文件。
profiles.first_verification: Search or list one teacher-approved folder; do not upload, share, or delete files.

profiles.label: Google Calendar 規劃唯讀
profiles.purpose: 讀取日曆、忙閒資訊，協助規劃教學或行政時程。
profiles.first_verification: List calendars or retrieve free/busy information; do not create events.

profiles.label: Gmail 讀取與草稿
profiles.purpose: 搜尋既有信件與建立教師審閱用草稿。
profiles.first_verification: Search a teacher-approved query. Draft creation and sending both require separate user confirmation.

profiles.label: People／聯絡人唯讀
profiles.purpose: 讀取聯絡人或組織目錄，僅適用於已有正當工作需求的行政流程。
profiles.first_verification: Read only the current profile or a minimal approved directory query.

profiles.label: Google Chat 唯讀
profiles.purpose: 讀取核准的 Chat 空間與訊息，以整理會議或工作脈絡。
profiles.additional_setup: A Google Chat app must be configured before this profile can be used.
profiles.first_verification: List an approved space only; do not create messages.
